title: rubus × lengyelii
intro: Rubus × lengyelii, also known as the Lengyel's raspberry, is a hybrid plant species within the Rubus genus, specifically a cross between Rubus idaeus and Rubus fruticosus. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The Lengyel's raspberry is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Rubus × lengyelii, including teas, infusions, and jams, are used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
